duplications_consolidated: Engine benchmark list now matches supported sklearn engines only.
Preset prediction engines now point to valid current engine names.
CLI help dump now covers db commands and subcommands.
COMMANDS/OPERATING docs now include SQLite db commands and modern sklearn engines.
risks: Line reduction is intentionally small; larger cuts require extracting cli_train/report code in a separate pass.
Removed optional xgboost/catboost/lightgbm hooks were not valid current engines.
Runtime reports are generated locally under ignored runtime/ and are not operational artifacts.
tests: python -m compileall -q src\aurum\legacy_prediction_engines.py src\aurum\cli_train.py src\aurum\cli.py -> PASS
next_safe_reduction_path: Extract train detail rendering from cli_train.py into a dedicated module.
Move benchmark rendering/running into train_engine_benchmark.py with dependency injection for tests.
Centralize CSV/price readers shared by basket/features_v2/prediction_lab.
Review legacy_inventory/legacy_classification after one more stable cycle.
